content:
Hello Everyone,
I would love some feedback on how often we should meet. I think monthly was too much to ask;)
Any preferences on quarterly meetings?

Regards

Sonia Barbosa said:

Hello Everyone,
I would love some feedback on how often we should meet. I think monthly was too much to ask;)
Any preferences on quarterly meetings?

Regards

Hello Sonia,

This is something we included to discuss during the working group meeting in Barcelona. @Deirdre Kirmis and I will make sure to share out afterwards so we can make a decision then.

Anything else we should consider for the working group meeting?

Also, @Sonia Barbosa we were hoping to start the meeting with community updates on large data support efforts .. since you will not be there and Ceilyn will be late could we share some points about Harvard's workflow? I prefer to let her do it, but just in case for some reason it doesn't work out.

Hi Deirdre - for sure, do you need anything from me on this?

Deirdre Kirmis said:

Also, Sonia Barbosa we were hoping to start the meeting with community updates on large data support efforts .. since you will not be there and Ceilyn will be late could we share some points about Harvard's workflow? I prefer to let her do it, but just in case for some reason it doesn't work out.

@Sonia Barbosa Maybe if you could just send me a few key points or updates on how the Harvard Large Data Support workflow is going that I can share .. I was going to ask each attendee to share about their own org's process for dealing with larger datasets and one thing that is working well ... I know you all have the website, intake form, services and documentation all built out .. and a video or two about it as well! .. but maybe just a summary or some key things that you've learned or that work or don't work or any updates to what you shared last year .. i think we all strive to eventually have such a service! Thank you!

Satellite_logistics_DCM2026.pdf
Hi All .. here is information regarding the satellite meetings at DCM2026 including the final timetable, as well as loogistics and security information. Note: we will all need to meet at the BSC Reception to receive an access badge and then will be escorted to the room. I will send an email as well if I can find everyone's email address. :slight_smile:
